label: Transparent cassowary motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Cassowary transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a cassowary casque motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A dramatic southern cassowary head-and-neck portrait with the full horn-like casque visible, glossy black feather mantle, electric cobalt and turquoise blue neck skin, vivid red wattle, warm amber-brown casque with rugged keratin texture, sharp dark beak, alert eye. Accurate cassowary anatomy, premium naturalistic detail, crisp subject silhouette, no extra birds.
Composition/framing: centered bust cutout with generous padding; casque, head, neck, red wattle, and black feather base all visible, not cropped. Clean studio lighting that preserves black feather texture, blue neck, red wattle, and casque relief. No cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no rainforest scene, no leaves, no branches, no props, no text, no watermark, no second subject, no cartoon, no floor plane, no shadow.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Cassowary light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Cassowary", derived from a cassowary casque motif: glossy black feathers, electric blue neck, vivid red wattle, amber-brown rugged casque, tropical rainforest shadow, and dramatic identity-system presence. Use the visible cassowary cutout as motif reference.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, target 3840x2160 feel with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Cassowary, Cassowary, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from black feather texture, cobalt and cyan neck skin, red wattle signal color, amber casque keratin, rainforest greens, and dramatic high-contrast silhouette. The board must read as cassowary casque and tropical rainforest, not generic peacock, parrot, toucan, or blue-purple gradient UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, bar chart, line chart, status chips, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, dramatic identity system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, cool mist light surfaces, black-feather ink text, casque-amber primary actions, cobalt focus states, red wattle destructive/signal chips, rainforest green navigation, subtle feather and casque texture bands, restrained shadows, dense but organized catalog/product dashboard UI.
Color palette: feather ink #111316, feather graphite #25282b, neck cobalt #0057b8, throat cyan #18a8d8, wattle red #c8172e, casque amber #b6782b, rainforest green #184b36, moss shadow #4f6b43, mist background #eef4ef, bone surface #f8f2e7.
Constraints: no peacock identity, no parrot/toucan, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon colors beyond natural cassowary blue, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Cassowary", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Cassowary dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Cassowary". It must feel like the same light-mode cassowary system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the cassowary casque motif: glossy black feathers, electric blue neck, vivid red wattle, amber-brown rugged casque, and tropical rainforest shadow. Use the visible cassowary cutout and the light-mode board language as references.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, target 3840x2160 feel with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Cassowary, Cassowary, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Preserve the cassowary identity: near-black feather backgrounds, cobalt and cyan neck focus states, wattle-red alerts, casque amber primary highlights, rainforest green sidebars, mist text, subtle feather and casque texture bands. Must read as cassowary casque and tropical rainforest, not generic peacock, parrot, toucan, or blue-purple gradient UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, bar chart, line chart, status chips, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: dramatic dark identity system, black feather and rainforest night backgrounds, charcoal cards, mist foreground text, amber casque active controls, cobalt focus rings, cyan links, red wattle destructive states, rainforest-green navigation, restrained contrast, crisp shadcn/tweakcn components, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius.
Color palette: feather night #080a0c, graphite card #171a1d, feather border #2b3033, neck cobalt #0a63d8, throat cyan #22b5df, wattle red #dc1f37, casque amber #c4812f, rainforest green #0d3b2a, moss shadow #668055, mist text #edf5ef, bone text #f6ead7.
Constraints: no peacock identity, no parrot/toucan, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon colors beyond natural cassowary blue, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Cassowary".
